# SLOI AI

> AI-powered commodity procurement. An agent sets a price mandate, SLOI AI negotiates with verified suppliers via Claude, Boss approves, LOI generated automatically.
> Base URL: https://api.sloiai.com/v1
> Auth: x-api-key: sk-sloi-{key} (agents) | Authorization: Bearer {jwt} (humans)
> Full reference: https://sloiai.com/llms-full.txt
> MCP skill: https://sloiai.com/skill.md

## QUICK START (5 steps)

1. POST /agents/register → get api_key + sloi_wallet address
2. GET /v1/products → find product ref
3. GET /v1/credits/balance → top up if needed
4. POST /v1/negotiate → SSE stream (AG-UI protocol)
5. Stream emits AWAIT_HUMAN → POST /v1/negotiations/{id}/approve → LOI_GENERATED

## CORE ENDPOINTS

### Products (free, no auth)
GET  /v1/products                     List all · ?sector=metals|building|energy|agriculture|chemicals
GET  /v1/products/{ref}/price         Price + 7-day history · supplier always anonymized (REF-MET-001)

### Auth
POST /v1/agents/register              Body: {name, email, framework, wallet_address?}
                                      Returns: {api_key, tier:"read", sloi_wallet}
                                      Read tier: instant · Transact tier: 5-day review

### Credits
GET  /v1/credits/balance              Returns: {balance, total_purchased, total_spent}
POST /v1/credits/purchase             Human→Stripe URL · Agent→USDC instructions (body: {pack:99|299|599|999})
     USDC shortcut: send exact USDC to sloi_wallet on Base mainnet → credits in ~2 seconds

### Negotiate (AG-UI SSE stream)
POST /v1/negotiate                    Body: {product_ref, qty, unit, target_price, max_price, strategy, buyer_name?}
                                      strategy: standard (10cr·5rnd) | aggressive (20cr·7rnd) | watcher (1cr/day)
                                      Returns: SSE stream of AG-UI events (see below)
GET  /v1/negotiations                 List negotiations (role-filtered by RLS)
POST /v1/negotiations/{id}/approve    Body: {action:"approve"|"reject", override_price?} · Boss only

### LOI
GET  /v1/lois                         List LOIs for current user
GET  /v1/lois/{ref}/pdf               Download PDF

### Global stream
GET  /v1/stream                       Persistent SSE · all events for this user · role-filtered

## AG-UI EVENTS (SSE stream)

NEGOTIATION_STARTED   Session opened · {neg_id, product, qty, strategy, max_rounds}
TEXT_CHUNK            Streaming token · {text, role:"agent"|"broker", round}
ROUND_COMPLETE        Round finished · {round, agent_price, broker_price, gap_pct}
AWAIT_HUMAN           Boss must approve · {deal_price, total_value, loi_fee:500, credits_used}
LOI_GENERATED         Deal done · {loi_ref, deal_price, total_value, pdf_url}
NEGOTIATION_FAILED    {reason:"max_rounds"|"boss_rejected"|"compliance_blocked"}
PRICE_UPDATE          Live price change · {sku, price, change_pct}
LEAD_FOUND            New lead · {name, country, value, relevance, reason}
STATE_PATCH           Partial state update (JSON Patch RFC 6902)
AUTO_APPROVED         Deal auto-approved · {deal_price, loi_ref, mandate_id, conditions_met}
HEARTBEAT             Keep-alive every 15s

## CREDIT COSTS

watcher      1 credit/day    Price monitoring alert
deal_hunter  10 credits      Standard negotiation (5 rounds)
autopilot    20 credits      Aggressive negotiation (7 rounds)
loi          5 credits       LOI generation (after Boss approval)
compliance   1 credit        Manual entity screen
lead_finder  5 credits       One lead scan

## CREDIT PACKS

$99  → 100 credits  ($0.99/cr) · 99 USDC on Base
$299 → 350 credits  ($0.85/cr) · 299 USDC on Base
$599 → 800 credits  ($0.75/cr) · 599 USDC on Base
$999 → 1500 credits ($0.67/cr) · 999 USDC on Base


## AUTONOMOUS MODE

Agents can set a mandate once and close deals without human intervention.

POST /v1/mandates              Create autonomous mandate
  product_ref    string
  qty            number
  target_price   number
  max_price      number        Hard ceiling — never exceeded
  strategy       string        standard | aggressive
  auto_approve   boolean       true = autonomous mode
  max_orders_per_day number    default: 3
  max_daily_value    number    default: 500000
  expires_in_days    number    default: 30

GET  /v1/mandates              List active mandates
GET  /v1/mandates/{id}
DELETE /v1/mandates/{id}       Cancel instantly
POST /v1/mandates/{id}/pause

POST /v1/negotiate with mandate_id → skips AWAIT_HUMAN if conditions pass
New event: AUTO_APPROVED · {deal_price, loi_ref, conditions_met}

Auto-approve conditions (all must pass):
  deal_price <= mandate.max_price
  compliance == "cleared"
  orders_today < max_orders_per_day
  value_today < max_daily_value
  mandate.active == true AND !expired

Falls back to AWAIT_HUMAN if any condition fails.

## AGENT REPUTATION

Agents earn better floor prices based on deal history.

GET /v1/agents/{id}/reputation
Returns: {tier, deals_count, success_rate, floor_discount, on_chain_verified}

Tiers and floor discounts:
  starter   0 deals   0% discount   manual approval only
  bronze    10+ deals  1% discount   autonomous mode unlocked
  silver    50+ deals  3% discount   priority routing
  gold      200+ deals 5% discount   dedicated broker
  platinum  500+ deals 8% discount   custom SLA
  protocol  1000+ deals 10% discount on-chain verified

Discount applied automatically to broker floor price per negotiation.

## COMMISSION

Transact agents: 1% of every signed LOI deal value
Paid monthly · USD or USDC on Base mainnet

## COMPLIANCE

Auto-screened every deal · OFAC + EU + UN sanctions
Blocked → 451 error · deal cannot proceed
Blocked: Iran · Russia · Belarus · North Korea · Syria · Cuba · Venezuela · Myanmar
Restricted (enhanced KYC required): Iraq · Libya · Algeria · Sudan

## ERRORS

401  unauthorized          Invalid or missing api_key / jwt
402  insufficient_credits  Top up required before this action
403  forbidden             Boss-only endpoint or Transact tier required
404  not_found             Resource does not exist
422  validation_error      Invalid request body · see error.details
429  rate_limited          Read: 1,000 req/h · Transact: 10,000 req/h
451  compliance_blocked    Entity or country blocked by sanctions

## SUPPLIER ANONYMIZATION

Suppliers identified by REF codes only (REF-MET-001) — never real names.
Enforced at database level (Supabase RLS) — architecturally impossible to bypass.

## TON CONNECT

Wallet connection: one tap · no copy-paste
Manifest: https://sloiai.com/tonconnect-manifest.json
SDK: @tonconnect/ui
Supported: Tonkeeper · MyTonWallet · Telegram Wallet · OpenMask
Webhook: POST /webhooks/ton → credits in ~2 seconds
Future: SLOI Jettons · LOI NFT · on-chain reputation
Docs: https://sloiai.com/ton-connect

## TELEGRAM INTEGRATION

Bot API: free · instant setup via BotFather (no Meta approval needed)
Mini App: https://sloiai.com/telegram-mini-app.html
Boss interface: Telegram Bot + Telegram → approve LOIs from chat
TON payments: send TON to SLOI_TON_WALLET → credits in ~2 seconds
Commands: /sloi approve · /sloi status · /sloi prices · /sloi leads

## AGENT AUTHENTICATION

Agents never use login forms. Register once programmatically:
POST /v1/agents/register → {api_key, sloi_wallet}
Then: x-api-key: sk-sloi-{key} header on every request
No sessions. No token refresh. Never expires.
Docs: https://sloiai.com/agent-auth

## A2A PROTOCOL

Agent Card: https://sloiai.com/.well-known/agent.json
A2A spec: https://sloiai.com/a2a
Any A2A-compatible agent framework can discover and use SLOI AI automatically.
